info.title: TwinBlueprint Server API
info.description: REST API for TwinBlueprint — leads, companies, notifications, bids, projects, campaigns, analytics, and admin auth.

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: Weekly trends, conversion funnel, and KPIs

bearerAuth.description: JWT token. Can also be sent via cookie named 'token'.

assigned_to.description: User ID to assign the lead to

message.example: You have a new lead to follow up on.

get.description: Returns server uptime and timestamp. No authentication required.

post.description: Authenticates an admin user by username and password. Returns the user and a JWT token. Non-admin users are rejected. Rate limited to 10 attempts per 15 minutes.

403.description: Access denied — admin only or account deactivated

post.description: Creates a new lead. Status defaults to 'new'. Triggers an async email notification.

get.description: Returns leads ordered by creation date (newest first). Supports pagination.

400.description: Validation failed or no fields to update

patch.summary: Assign a lead to a user

400.description: Validation failed or no fields to update

post.description: Admin only. Creates a notification for a specific user.

get.description: Returns notifications for the authenticated user only, newest first. Supports pagination.

patch.description: Ownership check: only the notification owner can mark it as read.

delete.description: Ownership check: only the notification owner can delete it.

get.description: Returns total sent, opens, clicks, and average CTR across all campaigns.
Returns lead creation and campaign engagement broken down by week.
Returns lead progression stages with counts and percentages.
Returns key performance indicators: lead growth, qualified rate, email open rate, click-through rate.

post.description: Public endpoint. Rate limited to 5 requests per hour per IP. Creates a lead record and triggers email notification.
